# Cradlewell — Nurse-Led Newborn & Postnatal Home Care
# Operated by Tenderkin Wellness Private Limited, Bangalore, India

## About
Cradlewell is a nurse-led newborn and postnatal home care service in Bangalore, India.
ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 27001:2022 certified. DPIIT Startup India recognized.
Winner, Entrepreneur India Startup Awards 2026 (Health & Wellness Category).
Serving 100+ families across Bangalore with certified, background-verified nurses.

## Services
- Newborn assessment, weight monitoring, feeding support
- Postnatal nursing: maternal recovery, wound care, breastfeeding guidance
- Jaundice monitoring and home-based phototherapy support
- Baby bath, umbilical cord care, hygiene routines
- Night care (9-hour overnight nursing support)
- Day care (8-hour daytime nursing support)
- C-section recovery support
- Lactation consultation and breastfeeding support
- Sleep training guidance for newborns
- Daily health monitoring and reporting

## Care Plans
- Care Light: Essential support for mother and baby
- Care Plus: Comprehensive postnatal and newborn care
- Care Max: Premium round-the-clock care package
Available in 30, 60, and 90-day durations. Day and Night shifts available.

## Team
- Lokesh — CEO & Co-founder
- Venu Annareddy — CFO & Co-founder
- Dr. Madhu Sudhan — COO (Medical Doctor)
- Dr. Vishnu Vardhan — CMO (Chief Medical Officer)
- Vijaya — Senior Nurse, Level III (25 years experience)
- Sneha Marcel — Senior Nurse, Level I
- Phelomit Lepcha — Nurse
- Pavithra — Yoga Consultant (15 years experience)
Combined team experience: 40+ years in maternal and neonatal care.

## Trust & Certifications
- ISO 9001:2015 quality management certification
- ISO 27001:2022 information security certification
- DPIIT Startup India recognition
- MCA registered company
- 4.8/5 star rating from 100+ families served
- Winner: Entrepreneur India Startup Awards 2026 (Health & Wellness)

## Service Area (Bangalore)
Koramangala, Indiranagar, Whitefield, HSR Layout, BTM Layout, Jayanagar,
Sarjapur Road, Electronic City, Marathahalli, Bannerghatta Road, JP Nagar,
and surrounding Bangalore neighborhoods.

## Content
- Blog: newborn care guides, postnatal recovery, jaundice monitoring, breastfeeding tips
- FAQ: home nursing visit questions, safety, cost, booking process
- Care plans: detailed service descriptions and pricing
